chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2118 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.09.2019 Mr. Mehtab Munir Nirban, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. -.-.-. Mr. Muhammad Ali Kolachi, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of respondents No.4 to 11, along with parawise comments / objections to the petition; taken on record. A copy of the comments / objections has been supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioners. Petitioners are present alongwith their Counsel. Petitioner No.1 has reiterated her marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own free will and choice. On the court’s direction, Petitioner No.1 has had a meeting with her parents for quite a considerable time. Even thereafter, she has adamantly refused to go with her parents and has submitted that she out of her own free will and choice has contracted marriage with petitioner No. 2 and would not leave him at any cost. In the circumstances, petitioner No.1 may go with petitioner No.2. However, the I.O of Crime No.25/2019 registered at P.S Miani @ Badani u/s 365-B, 452, 506/2, 34 PPC is directed to dispose of the case in the light of the statement of petitioner No.1, which she has made before this court and submit such summary report for disposal of the case either before the Magistrate concerned if the challan has not been submitted or before the trial court if the case has been sent up for trial along with a copy of this order. Learned Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law.

Learned Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be conveyed to office of learned Additional Advocate General Sindh, Hyderabad and SSP Kashmore at Kandhkot for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
